creator: michael.tasche@ellerburg.de
text:
This bug seems to be there from the beginning.
The difference between the control-code and the status-code is only one bit. 
#define SMIC_CC_SMS_RD_NEXT             0x45
#define SMIC_SC_SMS_RD_NEXT             0xc5

I assume, many BMCs perhaps ignore the on bit 0x80 and accept the status code as control code. On my platform the BMC ignores the wrong control-code.

Let's see, how many years this BUG will be in status new.
Unfortunately I have no experience providing a push request from my git repo to freebsd ...

Kind Regards
Michael
